scope: Add scoped presentation day check-out/check-in transitions to the existing D1-backed presentation slot workflow.
changes: Added functions/_lib/presentation-slots.ts to centralize presentation slot transition authorization, status validation, timestamp persistence, response formatting, and audit logging.
Added POST /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-out for in-scope admin/program-teacher staff to move scheduled slots to checked_out with checked_out_at.
Added POST /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-in for in-scope admin/program-teacher staff to move checked_out slots to checked_in with checked_in_at.
Blocked unauthenticated, mentor, out-of-scope teacher, check-in-before-check-out, and duplicate check-out attempts with audited denial events.
Expanded tests/presentation-slots.integration.test.mjs to cover check-out/check-in permissions, invalid status guards, timestamp preservation, and audit events.
Regenerated docs/generated/production-route-inventory.md so the new API routes are classified as protected production API surfaces.
Updated MVP catalog, backlog, source crosswalk, production surface registry, handoff ledger, rebuild log, run log, and this manifest.

validation.summary: Regenerated production route inventory with /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-out and /api/presentation-slots/:id/check-in.
Full Node test suite passed: 130 passing tests and 3 expected opt-in workspace smoke skips.

Aggregate check passed, including alpha contract, cadence, predeploy gate, production surfaces, route inventory, generated-output drift, site options, static Cloudflare verification, 130 passing tests, and typecheck; live Cloudflare verification remained blocked without CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.

blockers: Remote D1 apply/verification for migrations/0006_presentation_slots.sql requires CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN for non-interactive Wrangler; live Cloudflare mutation was not attempted.
next_actions: Surface presentation slot status, check-out, and check-in state in mentor/student/staff dashboard flows.
Persist outline approval gates for Mentor Meeting 2/presentation readiness.
Apply and verify migrations/0006_presentation_slots.sql against remote D1 once CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN is available.

automation_efficiency.scale_signal: accepted implementation pass; no cadence change recommended

phone_tracker.summary: Recorded MVP-017 presentation check-out/check-in endpoint pass for phone-friendly tracking.
